job_id.description: Id of the job whose interview plan this stage belongs to.

sort_order.description: Position of this stage within the job's interview plan, ascending. The first stage (typically `Application Review`) is `0`; `Offer` is always last.

name.description: Name of the stage as it appears on the job's interview plan (e.g. `Application Review`, `Phone Screen`, `Onsite`, `Offer`). `Application Review` and `Offer` are added to every plan; intermediate stages can be picked from the Greenhouse library or created custom per job.

active.description: Whether the stage is on the job's current interview plan. Inactive stages are retained so that historical `application_stages` rows continue to resolve, but no new applications enter them.

description: Schema for the 'job_interview_stages' stream, linked to the '/v3/job_interview_stages' endpoint.
